issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing git history or empty dependency lists.
The skill relies on Unix-like shell commands and may not work on Windows without a compatible environment.

scenarios.name: Prioritize refactoring targets in a Django repo
scenarios.rationale: Treatment correlates grep TODO/FIXME counts with git log --since='6 months ago' --name-only churn and --grep='fix|bug|hotfix' bug density, then weights the composite (30/30/20/20) into P0/P1/P2 buckets exactly as Steps 3-4 prescribe; baseline lists code smells without churn or bug correlation, so it cannot distinguish 'actually hurting' debt from stable complexity.

scenarios.name: Node.js dependency debt audit
scenarios.rationale: Treatment runs npm outdated and groups output by CRITICAL/MAJOR/MINOR with effort estimates and security flag callouts as in Example 2; baseline just dumps the raw npm outdated table without risk tiering or effort estimates the skill's Guidelines require.
